title: Policy engine input
description: Shapes accepted by the policy bundle. Exactly one of the four variants applies to a given evaluation. Every variant carries resource_id so the emitted decision can be traced to an exact asset locator in the source state.

resource_id.description: Identifier of the asset or exception being evaluated.

identityInput.title: Identity input
identityInput.description: Evaluated by NF.IDENTITY.PRIVILEGED_ASSURANCE. Human identities are assessed on MFA strength; service identities on ownership and credential age.

mfa.description: Authentication factor in use. Only phishing-resistant satisfies the control for privileged human identities.

credential_age_days.description: Age of the current credential. Privileged service identities must not exceed 90.

owner.description: Named accountable owner. Null or empty fails the control for privileged service identities.

storageInput.title: Storage input
storageInput.description: Evaluated by NF.STORAGE.RESTRICTED_PROTECTION. Only restricted and confidential classifications are in scope.

classification.description: Data classification of the store. Values other than restricted or confidential are out of scope for this control.

encryption.description: Encryption mode. The literal value none, an empty string, or a missing value fails the control.

log_sink.description: Reference to a log sink. When the logging inventory is available, the sink must exist and be immutable.

endpointInput.title: Endpoint input
endpointInput.description: Evaluated by NF.ENDPOINT.MANAGED_HEALTH. Freshness is measured against the state's generated_at, not wall-clock time.

last_seen.description: RFC 3339 timestamp. Missing or unparseable values fail closed as stale.

exceptionInput.title: Exception input
exceptionInput.description: A documented exception to a control. All five governance fields are mandatory; incomplete, malformed, or expired exceptions fail closed.

expires_at.description: RFC 3339 expiry. An expiry at or before the state's generated_at is expired.
